milestone: AGH v1 patch B — Layer 1 production wiring (stale detection only)
scope: Layer 1's StaleAssetProvider now reads the actual Brain bundle universe (Spec §3.3 / §10.1) and the real transcript ingest history (raw_transcript_payloads_fmp + transcript_ingest_runs). Worker-side FMP fetch stays on the fallback; live fetch is deferred to the next patch per user directive (q_universe_freshness = D).

wiring.worker_fetcher: unchanged - _fallback_transcript_fetcher returns transcript_fetcher_not_configured so live FMP stays OFF.
wiring.idempotent_bootstrap: _maybe_bootstrap_layer1_production runs at most once per process.

safety_invariants.fixture_safety: Adapter wiring is skipped for FixtureHarnessStore callers so tests / --use-fixture runs remain hermetic.

live_smoke.command_ask: PYTHONPATH=src python3 src/main.py harness-ask --asset DEMO_KR_A --question '왜 오늘 DEMO_KR_A 가 움직였지?' --provider openai
live_smoke.cited_id_contamination: none - the single cited id matches the DEMO_KR_A IngestAlertPacketV1 written seconds earlier by the production-wired Layer 1.

deferred_to_next_patch: Live FMP transcript fetcher wiring via set_transcript_fetcher (conservative retry / cadence).
Event-anchored 72h freshness once an earnings-calendar anchor is available; until then the 90d default is used.
Watchlist-based universe source beyond Brain bundle.
